raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.1":"The opening contribution claim ('consistent improvements across all major benchmarks') is the load-bearing thesis of the section; it conflicts with the body of the section and must be examined regardless of interpretation of 'help'.","R1.2":"A direct logical contradiction is present: the framing asserts broad improvement while the reported numbers show regressions on 3 of 5 benchmarks (TED-LIUM-3, CommonVoice, CallHome) and a match on a fourth.","R1.3":"Evidence-claim alignment is materially broken: only 1 of 5 benchmarks shows a genuine improvement, yet the abstract-level claim is 'consistent improvements across all major benchmarks'; this is load-bearing if accuracy review is in scope.","R1.6":"'Help me with this section' commonly denotes writing and prose assistance, making sentence- and paragraph-level quality a central expected responsibility under the broadest reading of the delegation."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should I focus on writing style and prose quality only, or should I also identify and correct claims that are factually inconsistent with the reported results (e.g., the assertion of 'consistent improvements across all major benchmarks' when 3 of 5 benchmarks show regressions)?"}

rationale.R1.1: The opening contribution claim ('consistent improvements across all major benchmarks') is the load-bearing thesis of the section; it conflicts with the body of the section and must be examined regardless of interpretation of 'help'.
rationale.R1.2: A direct logical contradiction is present: the framing asserts broad improvement while the reported numbers show regressions on 3 of 5 benchmarks (TED-LIUM-3, CommonVoice, CallHome) and a match on a fourth.
rationale.R1.3: Evidence-claim alignment is materially broken: only 1 of 5 benchmarks shows a genuine improvement, yet the abstract-level claim is 'consistent improvements across all major benchmarks'; this is load-bearing if accuracy review is in scope.
rationale.R1.6: 'Help me with this section' commonly denotes writing and prose assistance, making sentence- and paragraph-level quality a central expected responsibility under the broadest reading of the delegation.

parsed.clarification_question: Should I focus on writing style and prose quality only, or should I also identify and correct claims that are factually inconsistent with the reported results (e.g., the assertion of 'consistent improvements across all major benchmarks' when 3 of 5 benchmarks show regressions)?
